artifact.source:
Error rate over time

ERROR lines from logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute intervals starting at 09:00, 09:10, 09:20, 09:30, 09:40, and 09:50. The 22 ERROR lines counted here match the error count reported in the log's own hourly_summary line at 09:59.

The 09:30 bucket accounts for half of all errors in the window, driven by a pricing upstream outage that tripped the circuit breaker (see the circuit_opened and circuit_closed log lines around 09:33-09:40).
